'''Shiltu''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who worked for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In the syndicate, they held the rank of [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]], or lieutenant.<ref name="MedStar I" /> Sometime before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], they double-crossed [[Tarnese Lyanne]], a [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] who had invested much in [[Black market/Legends|black market]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations; the betrayal resulted in the ruination of Lyanne's clan.<ref name="MedStar I" /> In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Shiltu [[Death/Legends|died]] from a massive cellular hemorrhage, a sort of full-body stroke that ended the Hutt's life far too quickly and painlessly, in the opinion of [[Tarnese Bleyd]], a descendant of Lyanne.<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shiltu was first mentioned in ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'', a novel written by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]] which was published in [[2004]].<ref name="MedStar I" />
